examTitle: CEFR A1 Mock Writing - Sport & Fitness

parts.title: Part 1: Writing an Email to a Friend
parts.instructions: Write an email to a friend about the new sports centre in your town. Write 20-30 words.
parts.content: You want to tell your friend about the new sports centre in your town.

questions.question: Write your response
howToApproach: Step 1: Write a greeting to your friend
Step 2: Tell your friend about the new sports centre
Step 3: Explain the facilities at the centre
Step 4: Say goodbye to your friend
questions.modelAnswer:
Dear Sarah,
I want to tell you about the new sports centre in our town. It has a big swimming pool and a nice gym. We can play football there too. Bye,
Tom
questions.tips: Use a friendly tone and include some basic vocabulary about sports and facilities.

parts.title: Part 2: Choose One Task
parts.instructions: Choose ONE of the tasks below and write your response in 20-30 words.
parts.content: You are at a fitness class and have seen the following announcement in the gym.

questions.question:
Task A: ARTICLE

You have seen the following announcement in an international magazine: 'New Sports Centre Opens in London'. Write an article about it.
howToApproach: Step 1: Write a headline about the new sports centre
Step 2: Describe the facilities at the centre
Step 3: Explain when the centre opens
questions.modelAnswer:
New Sports Centre Opens in London

The new sports centre in London has opened. It has a big swimming pool and a nice gym. We can play football there too. The centre opens at 6 am.
questions.tips: Use a formal tone and include some basic vocabulary about sports and facilities.

questions.question:
Task B: LETTER

You have received a letter from a friend who has moved to a new city. Write a letter to your friend about the sports centre in your town.
howToApproach: Step 1: Write a greeting to your friend
Step 2: Tell your friend about the sports centre
Step 3: Explain how to get to the centre
Step 4: Say goodbye to your friend
questions.modelAnswer:
Dear John,
I want to tell you about the sports centre in our town. It has a big swimming pool and a nice gym. To get there, take the bus number 12. Bye,
Tom
questions.tips: Use a friendly tone and include some basic vocabulary about sports and facilities.

questions.question:
Task C: REVIEW

You have seen a review of a new fitness class on social media. Write a review about the class.
howToApproach: Step 1: Write a headline about the fitness class
Step 2: Describe the class and the instructor
Step 3: Explain how you feel about the class
Step 4: Add a rating and a closing sentence
questions.modelAnswer:
Fitness Class Review

I did a fitness class today. The instructor was nice and the music was good. I feel happy and tired after the class. I give it 5 stars. I recommend it!
questions.tips: Use an informal tone and include some basic vocabulary about sports and fitness.
